full_description: FocusFlow is a productivity app designed to help users stay focused and avoid distractions. The app provides a range of tools to boost productivity, including a Pomodoro timer, website blockers, and a to-do list. The Pomodoro timer allows users to work in focused, 25-minute increments, followed by a 5-minute break. The website blockers feature enables users to block distracting websites and social media platforms during work sessions. The to-do list allows users to organize and prioritize tasks, setting reminders and deadlines as needed. With FocusFlow, users can customize their workflow to suit their needs, tracking progress and adjusting their approach as needed. By minimizing distractions and maximizing focus, users can achieve their goals more efficiently and effectively.
